stem: A scatterplot shows the relationship between two variables, x and y. A line of best fit passes through (0, 14) and (14, 0). Which of the following is closest to the slope of the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The slope is (0 − 14)/(14 − 0) = −14/14 = −1.0.

Choice D is wrong sign. Choices A and B come from misreading the rise/run as 2.
